description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof design with large glass panels and open-plan living spaces. The structure is surrounded by a well-maintained lawn, mature trees, and landscaped shrubs, creating a harmonious blend with nature. The front facade showcases a prominent entryway with steps leading up to a covered porch area, flanked by tall, narrow windows and decorative plants. The building's exterior combines dark and light wall finishes, with wood and concrete textures visible throughout. Multiple large windows and sliding glass doors provide ample natural light and views of the garden. The rear and side elevations reveal additional outdoor seating areas and a mix of private and communal spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, wood and concrete finishes, surrounded by landscaped greenery and mature trees.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, covered porch, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and shrubs.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the flat roof, rear garden area, and a mix of wood and concrete wall finishes.
description_view_2: Back view displaying private outdoor spaces, large windows, and a variety of trees and bushes.
description_view_3: Side-front view emphasizing the open lawn, multiple entry points, and the integration of greenery with the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
